'''ngayara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackrope|crackrope]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackrope|crackrope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngayara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæyæræth|ngæyæræth]] || [[word:ngæyæræj|ngæyæræj]] || [[word:ngæyæræsh|ngæyæræsh]] || [[word:ngæyæræ|ngæyæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayayarath|ngayayarath]] || [[word:ngayayaraj|ngayayaraj]] || [[word:ngayayarash|ngayayarash]] || [[word:ngayayara|ngayayara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayarath|ngayarath]] || [[word:ngayaraj|ngayaraj]] || [[word:ngayarash|ngayarash]] || [[word:ngayara|ngayara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayafrath|ngayafrath]] || [[word:ngayafraj|ngayafraj]] || [[word:ngayafrash|ngayafrash]] || [[word:ngayafraf|ngayafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngayaratha|ngayaratha]] || [[word:ngayaraja|ngayaraja]] || [[word:ngayarasha|ngayarasha]] || [[word:ngayaraka|ngayaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngayarath|ngayarath]] || [[word:ngayaraj|ngayaraj]] || [[word:ngayarash|ngayarash]] || [[word:ngayara|ngayara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngayarathal|ngayarathal]] || [[word:ngayarajal|ngayarajal]] || [[word:ngayarashal|ngayarashal]] || [[word:ngayarakal|ngayarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngayarathatha|ngayarathatha]] || [[word:ngayarajaja|ngayarajaja]] || [[word:ngayarashasha|ngayarashasha]] || [[word:ngayaraka|ngayaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngayarathan|ngayarathan]] || [[word:ngayarajan|ngayarajan]] || [[word:ngayarashan|ngayarashan]] || [[word:ngayarakan|ngayarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngayarathaoro|ngayarathaoro]] || [[word:ngayarajaoro|ngayarajaoro]] || [[word:ngayarashaoro|ngayarashaoro]] || [[word:ngayarakaoro|ngayarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
